name: Bald Ball
short_description: Bald Ball is a difficult physics-based game where you control a man in a hamster ball climbing the world to reach the moon made of cheese. Will you master the power of the hamster ball?
detailed_description:
You are a tiny, bald human trapped in a world ruled by rats. Once a pet, now abandoned, left with nothing but your hamster ball and a hunger big enough to eat the moon.

But what if the moon is made of cheese?

Armed with nothing but your rolling prison, you'll climb, bounce, and fumble your way out of this forgotten house, through the crumbling city, and beyond—toward that delicious, impossible dream in the sky.

A physics-based platformer where movement is both your greatest challenge and your only tool, this game will test your patience, precision, and perseverance. Every bounce matters. Every roll is a risk. And every fall? Well... you'll get back up. Probably.

Will you reach the moon, or will you just be another pet lost to history?
